summary: Contracts can sign verifiable messages via [ERC-1271](./eip-1271.md). However, if the contract is not deployed yet, [ERC-1271](./eip-1271.md) verification is impossible, as you can't call the `isValidSignature` function on said contract. We propose a standard way for any contract or off-chain actor to verify whether a signature on behalf of a given counterfactual contract (that is not deployed yet) is valid. This standard way extends [ERC-1271](./eip-1271.md).
title: Signature Validation for Predeploy Contracts
